Tracy McGrady's brother Ken had a press conference yesterday originally but it was delayed for five hours. As time went by, tempers flared up and harsh words were exchanged. Violence flared as they scuffled. Several people who were dressed in flared jeans were injured in scuffles with the security guards. As fighting flared up even some of the security guards got injured. Ken went back home before the press conference started because he gave a barbecue party at home. Some of his friends spilt too much oil when they were barbecuing the steaks, causing the barbecue to flare up. There was a sudden flare as their friends were barbecuing some chicken. As time passed, the sky was getting darker so they began lighting candles. Some of the candles flared then flickered. Others flickered and then went out. Ken let off the fireworks. Ken's sister Sarah helped set off the fireworks as well. Everyone else stood there admiring the flares of the fireworks. After five hours, the news conference finally began during which conflict flared up. At one point the conflict threatened to flare into a lawsuit. After half an hour the conflict quieted down but trouble began to flare up in several other cities simultaneously. Sarah has lots of clothes in her wardrobe such as a formal dress that flares out into a train, a pair of flares that flares at the ankle, a skirt that flares just above the knees, a pair of chinos that flares just above the ankle, and a skirt with flares. Ken has a horse in his garden. It's funny because when Ken is late to feed it, it'll flare its nostrils in anger then Ken's nostrils will flare back to communicate with it. Both Ken and Sara have a breezy smile and a breezy personality. They're both an easy-going type of person. I like their breezy manner very much. Last Tuesday Ken got off at the wrong stop and had to wait for another bus. I asked "how on earth did you miss your stop?" He said "I'm sorry. What can I say?" I complimented him on his basketball skills. He said "yes what can I say?" The current situation is bad. I said "Well yes what can I say?" We aren't able to fix the problem. This morning I was shocked when I saw a car crash on the street. He then said "I'm sure you were" His girlfriend said "I can imagine." Ken will be throwing a birthday party next Sunday at his place but alas I can't attend as I got work to do. When he invited me at first I said "We'll have to see" Ken's making the most elaborate preparations for his party. My cousin's husband asked him "how are the preparations for the party going?" Peter is assisting with preparations for the party. Jane is also assisting in making the party preparations. They're sharing the preparation between themselves so it isn't too much work. Happy birthday Ken! I'm sure your friends will join me in wishing you a very happy birthday. Last year he got a king size bed frame and mattress for my birthday. I remember I said "I can't believe you got me king size mattress and bed frame" They didn't come cheap. Tracy McGrady's sister Katie has accepted a commission to write an article on Picasso for an art magazine. Katie is doing research in preparation for the article. Her boyfriend is assisting in the preparation of the research too. Katie's favourite NBA team Lakers will be playing against Rockets in the playoff season the week after. A game like this requires proper preparation. The poster and the promo video for the playoffs are in preparation. The players in Lakers is doing careful preparation for it as they didn't perform well in their last game because they did no preparation. Rockets didn't seem to have perform well in their last two games too so this time they're doing thorough preparation for it including stealing, dunking and shooting as well as cardiovascular training. Training six hours a day is ideal preparation for the playoff season. You cannot play against a high level team without adequate preparation. Jane is making preparations for her ski trip to Tokyo.
